name: Impossible Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the milk, butter, eggs, sugar, buttermilk biscuit mix, and canned pumpkin.
2. Add pumpkin pie spice to taste.
3. Blend until all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 9-inch pie pan.
5. Bake at 400°F for 25 to 35 minutes, or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and rim comes out clean.
6. Allow the pie to cool completely.
7. Serve with whipped cream if desired.
